This weeks specials are:

(May 22nd through June 4th)

Garlic Soup

A chicken broth based soup with the wonderful flavor of fresh garlic. Served with egg, croutons, fresh cheese, and serrano chiles.

(gluten friendly without the crutons)

cup $3.95/ bowl $6.95

Tamales de Elote (appetizer)

These tamales, known as "Uchepos" in the state of Michoacan, Mexico are great appetizers.

They are made with corn kernels ground into masa (dough) which gives them the light sweet flavor of corn. We serve them topped with Mexican cream and queso fresco.

(gluten friendly)

$8.95

Chile Relleno Estilo Tamal

This relleno is a stuffed chile poblano with a mixture of three cheese's cooked tamale style wrapped in handmade masa. It is served with a roasted salsa topped with cotija cheese and served with rice and beans.

(gluten friendly with white or green rice)

$17.95

Cochinita Pibil

One of the representative dishes of the Yucatan Peninsula with its origins in the Mayan culture. It is pork marinated overnight in citrus juices, achiote, and spices that is then wrapped in banana leaves and baked slowly until very tender. We serve it with white rice, black beans, and pickled red onion (with or without sliced habanero peppers) in the traditional style.

(gluten friendly)

$19.75

Tacos de Carnitas

Three tacos of traditional slow cooked pork on corn tortillas topped with pickled red onion and cilantro. (gluten friendly)

$14.95

Baja Fish Tacos

Three tacos of battered cod with a chipotle aioli and topped with red and green cabbage and a sprinkling of queso fresco, Baja California style. Served with rice and beans.

$19.95

Buñuelos

Fresh strawberries served on a crisp cinnamon sugar tostada topped with a wonderful mango salsa.

$8.50
